steps.title: Locate the two clauses
steps.content: The sentence has one independent clause about the Longyearbyen observatory in Norway and another independent clause about Buckland Park in Australia. The blank must join those complete clauses correctly.

steps.title: Choose the clause break
steps.content: A uses and without the needed comma before it. B fuses the clauses with no punctuation. C joins the clauses with only a comma, creating a comma splice. A semicolon correctly joins two independent clauses without a conjunction. The answer is D.
